title: ReleaseSet
description: An assigned release set describing the canonical software and boot artifacts that should be realized on one or more target devices at a given release version.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

status.description: Lifecycle state of the release set.

gitRef.description: Git ref from which this release was built, e.g. "refs/heads/main".

gitCommit.description: Full SHA-1 or SHA-256 Git commit hash that produced this release.

gitRefBuildRef.description: Optional URN reference to the GitRefBuild record for this release.

source.description: Source Git provenance for this release set.

targets.description: List of target devices or device groups this release set is assigned to.

targetKind.description: Kind of the target: a single device, a named device group, or a fleet.

targetRef.description: URN reference to the target device, group, or fleet.

experienceProfileRef.description: Optional URN reference to the ExperienceProfile defining the desktop/UX posture for this release.

isolationProfileRef.description: Optional URN reference to the IsolationProfile defining the container and namespace boundaries for this release.

storeClosureHash.description: Content-addressed hash of the Nix/ostree store closure, e.g. "sha256-...".

imageRef.description: OCI image reference for the system image, e.g. "oci://registry.example/sourceos/system@sha256:...".

bootReleaseSetRef.description: Optional URN reference to the BootReleaseSet containing boot artifacts for this release.

artifacts.description: Key artifact references for the release set.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this release set was created.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this release set.
